_doc: Per-line validator configuration. The _default key applies to every cruise line; line-specific keys override _default. Both validate-ship-page.sh and validate-ship-page.js read this file. See admin/SHIP_STANDARDIZATION_PLAN.md and admin/POLICY_DECISIONS.md for the rationale behind each value.

carnival._doc: Carnival template uses id="main" rather than id="main-content". Convention, not bug. Documented per Policy 1.1.

holland-america-line._doc: HAL template uses .col-1 single-column layout in some sections rather than .page-grid two-column. Convention, not bug.

rcl._doc: RCL flagships consistently ship 10+ images; raise the floor for this line.

ai_summary_boilerplate_phrases: deck plans, live tracker, dining venues, and stateroom videos. Plan your Royal Caribbean cruise
deck plans, live tracker, dining venues, and stateroom videos. Plan your
deck plans, dining venues, stateroom tours
historical information, legacy, and ship details
_doc_boilerplate: ai_summary_boilerplate_phrases: ≥1 hit on a ship's ai-summary => ICP-018 ERROR. Phrases 1–2 are the exact original boilerplate; 3–7 are atomic fragments added 2026-05-09 (Phase 3.2b) to catch evading variants ('...and videos' without 'stateroom', 'live tracking' gerund, 'historical information' lazy template, 'dining venues, stateroom tours' word-order swap). 8–11 are common templated tells that should never appear in a unique summary.
_doc_main_entity: main_entity_whitelist/blacklist: drives SCHEMA-002. mainEntity @type must be in whitelist; @type in blacklist is BLOCKING. main_entity_preferred = Vehicle (Schema.org subtype of Product specifically for transport devices including ships). Product is acceptable but raises an info-level 'prefer Vehicle' suggestion. Per orchestra debate 2026-04-29 — see audit-reports/orchestra/2026-04-29-policies-0.1-0.4.json. TouristAttraction should be added as additionalType, not as a sibling graph node.
